title: Deadfast 20300505 Ant Killer Plus Powder Natural 150g, Red
features: Kills ants, cockroaches, wasps, moths, flies, fleas and more
description: From the manufacturer DEADFAST ANT KILLER NATURAL POWDER ADVANCED PEST CONTROL SOLUTIONS TO PROTECT YOUR FAMILY AND HOME DEADFAST ANT KILLER NATURAL POWDER Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Powder is a naturally active ready to use powder for the control of crawling insects. It is effective on ants, cockroaches, mites, flies and many more. Kills ants and the nest Contains a natural active ingredient derived from Chrysanthemum flowers Use both indoors and outdoors Can be used near food handling surfaces A Naturally Derived Formula Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Powder can be used for the control of ants, flies (two-winged), mosquitoes, cockroaches, wasps, earwigs, silverfish and other bristletails, fleas, bedbugs, dust mites, moths, booklice, aphids, caterpillars and sawflies. How to use Use as a dry powder only. One application can destroy the nest within 3 weeks. Indoors Apply 10g of product per square metre. Can be used in storerooms, garages and sheds. Can be used on pet bedding and in living areas. Outdoors For dry application. Sprinkle 10g of product on nests around buildings on paved areas. Do not use in windy conditions. Puff powder gently and directly into the nests or between cracks in paving or decking areas. For ants nests in lawns, apply 20g per square metre. Do not empty into surface water or drains. When to Use Apply at weekly intervals to nesting and breeding sites as instructed above, in the mornings or evenings when the ants are in the nest Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Bait Station Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Spray Deadfast Ant Killer Plus Natural Powder Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.0 out of 5 stars 2,263 4.4 out of 5 stars 389 4.4 out of 5 stars 39 Price £5.18 £ 5 . 18 £5.00 £ 5 . 00 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 Format Bait Station Spray Powder Pack Size 3 x 4g 750ml 150g Best Feature Safe to use around children & pets Long-lasting effect, up to 3 months Naturally-derived active ingredient Action Works within 24 hours Kills on contact Rapid knockdown Application Bait station can be placed on horizontal / vertical surface Spray applied direct to surface Powder applied direct to surface & also on lawns Treatment Indoors & Outdoors Indoors & Outdoors Indoors, Outdoors & Lawns
